stemHtml:
Which of these statements about trimming in a irreversible flight control system of a conventional aeroplane are correct or incorrect?

I. The zero force position of the control column does not change when using the pitch trim
II. The zero force position of the control wheel changes when using the aileron trim

options.a: I is correct, II is correct.
options.b: I is incorrect, II is correct.
options.c: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
options.d: I is correct, II is incorrect.
